title: KamenRiderWeaponCraft
description: Assemble all Rider's Weapons is Mod!
body:
This is the first version of the module developed by the author, adapted from the "Kamen Rider" series. In this module, a large number of items modeled after the weapons of Kamen Riders from various generations have been added, such as swords, bows, fishing rods, shields, and so on. The current version is not yet fully updated, so please download and try it out to support my Mod project.
 
Most of the models were made independently by the author (2537530079@qq.com). Of course, you can also see the contributions of some other creators in the module introduction.
 
This Mod is not just a simple reproduction of the models in the show. Currently, the development of reproducing various skills from the show is also in progress. For example, now when you hold the "Sonic Arrow" in your off - hand, press the "Y" key, and a GUI interface for inserting Lockseeds will open. After inserting the "melon" Lockseed, you can perform operations similar to those in the show. Moreover, all the weapons added so far have cut - in animations. You can trigger them by right - click.
By the way, don't forget to add the Geckolib and Patchouli mods as dependencies when using this mod.
Regarding the front panel of the module, if you encounter any issues, you can click on the version to check if the front panel is missing.
## Disclaimer / 免责声明
This is a non-commercial, fan-made project created purely out of love for the Kamen Rider series. The developer does not profit from this mod in any way.
Kamen Rider, Giff Stamp, Rider System, and all related characters, designs, and concepts are trademarks and copyrights of Toei Company, Ltd. and Ishimori Productions. This mod is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with Toei Company, Ishimori Productions, or any of their licensees.
This mod uses and depends on third-party mods including Minecraft Comes Alive - Reborn (MCA) for certain transformation mechanics. MCA is a separate project and remains the property of its respective authors.
As this mod is still in active development (Beta/Alpha), features and mechanics mentioned above are subject to change. Future updates regarding Rider content will be released incrementally.
